title: Bring Comfort to Your Portfolio With This Shoemaker's Stock
text: Ugg's parent company could help pad your portfolio.

title: KOOLABURRA BY UGG CELEBRATES ALL FAMILIES AND HONORS PRIDE WITH FAMILY EQUALITY AND BRAND AMBASSADOR, VANESSA ALVAREZ
text: $25 FROM EACH PAIR OF THE PASTEL COLLECTION SOLD ON KOOLABURRA.COM THROUGH JUNE 30 TH WILL GO TO FAMILY EQUALITY, THE LEADING NATIONAL ORGANIZATION FOR LGBTQ+ FAMILIES SANTA BARBARA, Calif. , May 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- This Pride season, Southern California-based lifestyle brand Koolaburra by UGG®  (a division of Deckers Brands [NYSE: DECK]) is celebrating all families with a philanthropic product giveback to support Family Equality, the leading national organization for LGBTQ+ families, and partnering with SoCal activist Vanessa Alvarez.

title: Deckers' (DECK) Q4 Earnings Beat, HOKA Brand Shows Strength
text: Deckers (DECK) reports solid results for fourth-quarter fiscal 2022 on gains from HOKA ONE ONE and UGG brands, and the direct-to-consumer platform.

title: Why Deckers Brands Stock Popped Today
text: Sales of the designer's comfortable shoes and casual clothing are booming.

title: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones, S&P 500 Opens Green; Deckers In Focus After Record Quarter
text: Markets are down today as retail giants are battered by inflation in their latest earnings.

title: Footwear Stock Flies Higher After Strong Quarter
text: Deckers Outdoor Corp (NYSE:DECK) reported fiscal fourth-quarter earnings of $2.51 per share on revenue of $736.01 million after the close yesterday -- beating estimates of $1.32 per share and $639.2 million, respectively -- while also posting an upbeat full-year forecast.

title: Decker Outdoor opened 20% up on Friday: what happened?
text: Deckers Outdoor Corp (NYSE: DECK) opened 20% up in the stock market on Friday after the shoe stores company reported strong results for its fiscal fourth quarter. Deckers Outdoor Q4 financial highlights Net income more than doubled in fiscal fourth quarter to $68.8 million.

title: Deckers Outdoor Stock Jumps. Thank Strong UGG Sales.
text: Global UGG revenue increased 15% from last year to $1.9 billion.

title: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (DECK) CEO Dave Powers on Q4 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Deckers Outdoor Corporation (NYSE:DECK ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 19, 2022 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Erinn Kohler - VP-IR and Corporate Planning Dave Powers - President and CEO Steve Fasching - CFO Conference Call Participants Laurent Vasilescu - Exane BNP Paribas Jonathan Komp - Baird Mackenzie Boydston - BTIG Jay Sole - UBS John Kernan - Cowen Paul Lejuez - Citi Tom Nikic - Wedbush Securities Operator Good afternoon, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Deckers Brands' Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Deckers (DECK) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Deckers (DECK) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 85.93% and 14.25%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Earnings Results: Deckers sold $2 billion worth of Ugg boots in record year, stock jumps 12%
text: Deckers Outdoor Corp. wrapped up a record year with roughly $2 billion in sales of Ugg boots, pushing the company to an earnings beat and a soaring stock price Thursday.

title: Deckers Outdoor Shares Jump After Solid Q4 Results
text: Deckers Outdoor Corp (NYSE: DECK) reported fourth-quarter net sales growth of 31.2% year-over-year to $736 million, +31.7% on a constant currency basis, beating the consensus of $639.20 million. Wholesale net sales increased 37.6% Y/Y to $448.8 million, and Direct-to-Consumer increased.

title: Deckers Announces Leadership Transition in Performance Lifestyle
text: GOLETA, Calif. , May 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deckers Brands (NYSE: DECK), a global leader in designing, marketing and distributing innovative footwear, apparel and accessories, today announced that after seven years leading the HOKA and Teva brands to new heights Wendy Yang is stepping down from her role as President of Performance Lifestyle, effective as of the end of the month.

title: DECKERS BRANDS REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL FISCAL YEAR 2022 FINANCIAL RESULTS
text: FY 2022 REVENUE OF $3.150 BILLION, UP 24% VS. FY 2021; UP 48% VS.

title: Sanuk® Releases New All-Gender Footwear Capsule in Partnership With Pacific Pride Foundation
text: With Pride-Forward Styling and Signature Sanuk Comfort, Collaboration Celebrates Inclusivity and Allyship GOLETA, Calif. , May 10, 2022  /PRNewswire/ -- Sanuk, a division of Deckers Brand (NYSE: DECK), today announced the next iteration of its partnership with Central Coast neighbor Pacific Pride Foundation, the largest LGBTQ+ center between Los Angeles and San Francisco dedicated to creating a thriving, vibrant and visible LGBTQ+ community.
